wechatpadpro.label: WeChatPadPro
wechatpadpro.description: Connect OpenClaw to WeChat via WeChatPadProMax (iPad protocol). WebSocket is the base transport; webhook can be enabled as an additional inbound channel.

host.description: WeChatPadProMax server host (IP or hostname). Required for outbound; leave empty only for passive webhook-only receivers.

wxid.description: WeChat ID (optional; auto-detected from Newinit / WS envelope)

wsUrl.description: Custom WebSocket URL (auto-constructed from host as ws://{host}:8089/ws/sync when empty)

webhookEnabled.description: Additionally run a local HTTP listener and register it with WCPPM so pushes arrive via webhook as well as WebSocket. Duplicates are deduped by MsgId.

webhookUrl.description: Public URL WCPPM will POST to (used for auto-registration via /Webhook/Set). Required when webhookEnabled and host is set; ignored in passive webhook-only mode.

webhookHost.description: Bind address for the local webhook HTTP server (default 127.0.0.1; set 0.0.0.0 to expose directly without a reverse proxy)

webhookPort.description: Local HTTP server port for receiving webhook pushes

webhookSecret.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for webhook signature verification (strongly recommended)

webhookDebug.description: On signature mismatch, log full signing input and return diagnostic fields in 401 body. Leaks a 12-char HMAC prefix — disable in production.

webhookSilentDropUnsigned.description: If a push arrives with an empty body.Signature, return 200 and drop the messages instead of 401. Escape hatch for draining a WCPPM retry queue built while no secret was configured. Wrong-but-non-empty signatures are still rejected.

readOnly.description: Receive-only mode — blocks all outbound sends for account safety

maxMessageAge.description: Drop messages older than this many seconds (avoids replaying stale history)

allowFrom.description: List of wxid allowed to DM the bot (used when dmSecurity = allowlist)

passRevokemsg.description: Pass through message recall notifications (MsgType 10002 revokemsg)

replyWithMention.description: In group chats, prefix replies with @sender mention

proxy.description: Proxy URL for outbound HTTP/WS (e.g. socks5://user:pass@host:port)

host.label: Server Host
host.help: WeChatPadProMax server IP or hostname. Leave empty only for passive webhook-only receivers (no outbound).

wxid.label: WeChat ID
wxid.help: Auto-detected from Newinit response / WS envelope when left empty

wsUrl.label: WebSocket URL
wsUrl.help: Optional override; auto-constructed from host when empty

webhookEnabled.label: Enable Webhook Receiver
webhookEnabled.help: Also accept inbound pushes over HTTP webhook in addition to WebSocket. Useful as a redundancy layer; duplicates are deduped by MsgId.

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.help: Public URL WCPPM will POST to. Required when webhookEnabled and host is set.

webhookHost.label: Webhook Bind Address
webhookHost.help: Default 127.0.0.1 (loopback, behind reverse proxy). Set 0.0.0.0 to expose the webhook server directly on all interfaces.

webhookSecret.label: Webhook Secret
webhookSecret.help: HMAC-SHA256 shared secret for signature verification

webhookDebug.label: Webhook Debug Mode
webhookDebug.help: Enable only while diagnosing signature failures — leaks a 12-char HMAC prefix in logs and 401 bodies.

webhookSilentDropUnsigned.label: Silently Drop Unsigned Pushes
webhookSilentDropUnsigned.help: Workaround for a poisoned WCPPM retry queue. Turn on to drain, then turn off to restore strict signature verification.

readOnly.label: Read-Only Mode
readOnly.help: Receive only; blocks all outbound sends (account safety)

maxMessageAge.label: Max Message Age (s)
maxMessageAge.help: Drop messages older than this to avoid replaying stale history on reconnect

allowFrom.label: DM Allowlist
allowFrom.help: wxids permitted to DM the bot (used when dmSecurity = allowlist)

replyWithMention.label: Reply With @Mention
replyWithMention.help: In group chats, prefix replies with @sender
